description: Modern Soldier Morphus table (Dark Designs pp. 53–55). Military gear and tactics; weapons, helmets, and armor may be biomechanical. With any Modern Soldier feature: +1 to save vs Horror Factor and +1 to Perception Rolls to recognize ambushes, booby-traps, military weapons, and explosive devices.

entries.name: Body Armor
entries.description: Full combat body armor with helmet—matte black, grey, desert brown, or camo; integrated into the Morphus and cannot be removed.
customOneOffs: Natural A.R. becomes 1D4+10.
No protection vs disease, gas attacks, possession, spells, Talents, magic weapons, or other supernatural powers (they ignore armor S.D.C.).

entries.name: Camouflage
entries.description: Head-to-toe camouflage—digital fatigues, grease paint, ghillie suit, or biomechanical paint/netting that shifts each Morphus change to match environment and psyche.
customOneOffs: With 1D4 minutes and materials, personal hide Perception 1D4+13 to spot.
-20% to opponents’ Detect Concealment, Detect Ambush, Tailing, and Tracking vs this Nightbane alone.
Automatic first initiative when ambushing from hiding.
Initiative penalty applies when not ambushing.

entries.name: Dress Uniform
entries.description: Formal military finery with patches and medals—any real or fictional service (e.g. Star Trek)—projecting authority and drawing attention.
customOneOffs: One Modern Weapon Proficiency of choice (Morphus only).
Disguise, Impersonation, and Undercover Ops allowed only when impersonating a military officer in full regalia.

entries.name: Gas Mask
entries.description: Permanent WWI-to-modern gas mask (often biomechanical/cybernetic)—shields from battlefield chemicals, fumes, tear gas, and airborne pathogens.
customOneOffs: Immune to non-magical airborne chemicals, gas attacks, fumes, stench, and disease; +4 to save vs magical gas effects.
Nuclear radiation ineffective; personal equipment on person not irradiated.
Voice muffled.

entries.name: Medic and First Aid
entries.description: Combat medic Morphus—surgical gloves/mask and a field kit that conjures basic first-aid supplies (1 P.P.E. per item visualized).
customOneOffs: Kit supplies conjured by thought (first aid only; no guns, phones, or EKG machines).
6 P.P.E. healing touch: stop bleed, heal open wounds, restart heart, restore 4D6 H.P. or S.D.C.
-4 damage from this character’s melee attacks.
Common stigmata: oozing bullet holes or bandaged head/face.

entries.name: Night Hunter/Nightvision Goggles
entries.description: Permanent nightvision goggles extending natural night sight to 3,000 ft—including magical darkness at half range without a save.
customOneOffs: Never afraid of the dark; impervious to magical blindness.
Punches, kicks, and handheld melee weapons do double damage vs Shadow creatures, Nightlords, and Nightlands denizens.
In daylight or well-lit areas: -3 Perception Rolls and -5% all skills.

entries.name: Field Radio
entries.description: Military field radio, satellite phone, or cybernetic comms—50 mile (80 km) range, jammed only by magic (Anti-Magic Cloud, Sanctum, etc.).
customOneOffs: Radio: Basic and Cryptography at 80% or +20% (whichever is higher) in Morphus.
Double Operator Talent range and halve its cost; double range in the Nightlands.

entries.name: Personal Weaponry
entries.description: Combat helmet and fatigues with one primary and one secondary weapon (always loaded; ammo replenishes every 24 hours).
customOneOffs: Primary (pick one): light assault rifle 4D6/600 m, heavy assault 5D6/500 m, light MG 6D6/1000 m, sniper 5D6/1609 m, shotgun 4D6/61 m, SMG 3D6/200 m.
Secondary (pick one): light pistol 3D6, heavy pistol 4D6, machine-pistol 2D6, 3× grenades 1D6x10/4.6 m, survival knife 1D6, large melee 2D6.
+2 strike and +1 parry with weapons from this feature; +2D6 damage vs Nightlords, minions, and Nightlands denizens.
-5% all skills except W.P., Military, Physical, and Espionage categories.

entries.name: Heavy Firepower
entries.description: One-man portable heavy weapon—rocket pod, heavy machine-gun, Gatling gun, or mini artillery (1D6×10 per attack, 4,000 ft range, 3 shots/round ammo).
customOneOffs: Double Darkblast range and damage when channeled through this weapon.
+10 damage vs Nightlords, demonic minions, and Nightlands denizens.

entries.name: Biomechanical
entries.description: Military biomechanical integration—tank treads, built-in machine-guns, or other gear as living Morphus parts.
customOneOffs: Roll or select a feature from the Biomechanical tables (including Aquatic and Gear-Head), then relate it to modern military (e.g. Rocket Jets as fighter-pilot dream, tank treads as armor mechanic).
Weapons, helmets, armor, and gas masks on this table may also manifest as biomechanical body parts.
